generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families. Did you know that last year, critical supply chain disruptions left hospitals in 3 states without essential medical equipment for over 72 hours? This isn't just theory - it's happening NOW. When we rely too much on foreign allies for our defense needs, we're putting our communities at risk. Let's make sure we have the capabilities to stand strong, no matter what. #NationalSecurity #StrongerTogether
